text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm strolling through the central
plaza...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Waaah?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Come on! What's with that reaction? Are you
making fun of my magic powers?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: No, I'm not! Not at all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey Trainer. Wanna join us? I'm acting as a
test subject for a magic experiment!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heh! Grandma taught me a new charm! It's a spell that makes you really motivated!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But when I cast it on Kitasan, she only says silly
things like "Wowie! Gee!" She's not taking this
seriously at all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry! I'm sure I'll feel my motivation go up for real next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the high standards Sweep Tosho is
holding her to, Kitasan Black goes along with her
demands without complaint. I wonder...
choice_data_list: Are you being bullied by a wicked witch?!

You must not want Sweep Tosho to hate you,
huh?

You must not want Sweep Tosho to hate you,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the high standards Sweep Tosho is
holding her to, Kitasan Black goes along with her
demands without complaint. I wonder...
choice_data_list: Are you being bullied by a wicked witch?!

You must not want Sweep Tosho to hate you,
huh?

You must not want Sweep Tosho to hate you,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
EXCUSE ME?! No one's getting bullied here! And
I'm not an evil witch, I'll have you know!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Right, Kitasan?! Say something to defend me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh, y-yeah! Sweep is right!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sure, Sweep is prone to throwing tantrums and
headstrong in her own ways, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Kitasan...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry! But I think it's best to tell the truth right
now.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, I got a bad score on a test and was
feeling down about it when Sweep called out to
me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She told me she was going to cast a special spell
on me that she hasn't used on anyone else before.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She's a bit awkward with her feelings, which
sometimes leads to people misunderstanding
her... But she has a really kind heart.
choice_data_list: I see. Seems I was worried about nothing, then.
I see. Seems I was worried about nothing, then.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Yeah, but I'm glad I could tell you all the
good things about my awesome friend!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's wrong, Sweep?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're such a blockhead! You... you think a
little praise will make me happy?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now my face feels all hot! This makes no sense!
Argh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you big dummy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sweep?! Oh no, what should we do now?
choice_data_list: We have to go after her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're right!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sweep! Come back here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Absolutely not! And stop following me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I follow Kitasan Black around the school
as she desperately chases after a red-faced
Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It ends up being a long haul, but it seems to have given Kitasan Black a little extra stamina.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What? What's with that reaction?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And why are you so scared of me hating you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Well... I heard you talking to a cat about
how you won't be friends with anyone who doesn't
listen to you or isn't affected by magic...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Is that what you were worried about?
You're so silly! There's a difference between a
familiar and a magic practice dummy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
A familiar like that cat has to obey my commands,
but... Hey, Kitasan. Close your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Sanidine! ☆ Anorthosite! ☆ Moonstone! Awaken
the motivation and energy deep inside this being!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well? Did the spell work?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Tell me the truth!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I don't feel any different...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I see. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Sanidine! ☆ Anorthosite! ☆ Moonstone! Awaken
the motivation and energy deep inside this being!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Sanidine! ☆ Anorthosite! ☆ Moonstone! Awaken
the motivation and energy deep inside this being!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Again?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yes, again! You're my training dummy after all! I'll
just keep casting the spell over and over until it
works!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep casting it tomorrow and the day after,
even! I won't hate you that easily, you know.
Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah... haha... I ended up being blasted by magic
over and over again.
choice_data_list:
Maybe she actually succeeded one of those
times.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Well...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep casting it tomorrow and the day after,
even! I won't hate you that easily, you know.
Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I think... It might have worked a tiny bit. My heart
still feels nice and warm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kitasan Black smiles shyly.
